hero.title: Bridging Innovation and Reliability
hero.subtitle: Fusing technical prowess with the Japanese spirit of 'Monozukuri' (Craftsmanship).

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.content: Founded in 2026, KaiZen Solutions was established to provide a superior offshore experience for Japanese enterprises. We combine the vast technical talent pool of India with a deep understanding of Japanese corporate culture and quality expectations.

bridge.title: Strategic Tech-Bridge
bridge.content: We serve as a vital link between the technological innovation of India and the precision-driven industries of Japan. Our mission is to synchronize these two powerhouses to create world-class digital solutions.

profile.title: Company Profile
profile.business_val: IT Consulting, Offshore Software Development, AI Solutions

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.subtitle: Uncompromising Quality
commitment.content: We don't just deliver code; we deliver peace of mind. Our processes are designed to mirror Japanese quality standards at every stage of the lifecycle.

integrity.title: Technical Integrity
integrity.desc: We prioritize clean, sustainable code over quick patches.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear communication and honest reporting in every sprint.

kaizen.title: Continuous Improvement
kaizen.desc: Always evolving our processes to serve our partners better.

footer.tagline: Architecting the future through continuous improvement and technical integrity.
footer.error_banner: Language toggle requires a local web server (CORS protection). Please use 'Live Server' or equivalent to test translations.
